who was in charge during the cold war  
module 1: framing  
the cold war was a period of geopolitical tension between the us and the soviet union, characterized by ideological conflict and nuclear rivalry. it was a time of great uncertainty and strategic competition.  

module 2: reasoning  
the main figures in charge during the cold war included president truman, president khrushchev, and president nixon. each played a critical role in shaping the outcomes of the conflict.
